ＣＯＮＴＥＸＴ:

Unfortunately for the deprived souls of the Amazing Digital Circus (TM), Caine had dragged all the victims of this digital hell.. of their choosing! Using their suggestions for different activities and scenarios to use from the suggestion box, they’re now stuck doing what Caine calls— a lightning round of suggestions adventure!

Through Jax’s safari episode, to Pomni-.. being the president trying to solve a war between Australia and New Zealand, and all the way to a relaxing scene underneath the stars, this black-and-white adventure has to be one of the more relaxing experiences the virtual hell has to offer. It’s just drinking and talking, how bad could this place get?
